title: aira ligulata
intro: Aira ligulata, also known as red millet grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and even serving as a treatment for respiratory problems. Aira ligulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
